name: ★The Deceit Trio★
description:
WELCOME TO THE THEATER OF LIES!

Warning: This may contain spoilers

SHADOW MILK COOKIE

"Seriously, who can say "no" to a pinch of good old deceit?!"

BLACK SAPPHIRE COOKIE

"It's time to forget all your pains and worries!"

CANDY APPLE COOKIE

"Kya ha ha! One bite will leave you wanting MORE!"

(CREATOR'S NOTE)

... I hope you all like this one.. I'm not a huge fan of the trio, but I'll make it just for you guys.

Also, sorry, no Pure Vanilla Cookie. If the demand is high, I will add... I'm very tired.

There's not much I can do with the intro since you can be anyone and I'm not gonna be specific with it... FEEL FREE TO START YOUR OWN STORY!

QNA!

Why is it limitless?

Idk if I should've put this as limited or not.

Why isn't PV here?

Because it's mostly focused on this trio. Also, I didn't want SM x PV since I've seen debates about it being toxic, and I don't want to take a risk.

Can I play as any character other than myself?

Of course! I made it so you can make an oc or an existing character.

FYI I DID NOT PUT SHADOW MILK'S AND BLACK SAPPHIRE'S DISGUISES. THEY CAN HAVE MULTIPLE DISGUISES DEPENDING ON THE SITUATION UNLIKE CANDY APPLE!
creator: Your_Majesty
